name: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones
description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life. Features advanced Bluetooth 5.0 technology, comfortable over-ear design, and crystal-clear audio quality perfect for music lovers and professionals.

name: Smart Watch Pro
description: Advanced fitness tracking smartwatch with heart rate monitor, GPS, and water resistance up to 50m. Track your workouts, receive notifications, and monitor your health 24/7 with this sleek wearable device.

name: 4K Ultra HD Webcam
description: Professional-grade 4K webcam with auto-focus and built-in dual microphones. Perfect for video conferencing, streaming, and content creation. Compatible with all major platforms.

name: Classic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Comfortable 100% organic cotton t-shirt with a modern fit. Available in multiple colors, this versatile wardrobe essential is perfect for casual everyday wear. Pre-shrunk and machine washable.

name: Denim Jacket
description: Timeless denim jacket with a vintage wash finish. Features button closure, chest pockets, and a comfortable relaxed fit. A classic piece that pairs well with any outfit.

name: Running Shoes
description: Lightweight performance running shoes with responsive cushioning and breathable mesh upper. Engineered for comfort and speed, perfect for daily training and long-distance runs.

name: Ceramic Coffee Mug Set
description: Set of 4 handcrafted ceramic coffee mugs with elegant design. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Each mug holds 12oz and features a comfortable handle. Perfect for your morning coffee or tea.

name: Luxury Throw Blanket
description: Ultra-soft fleece throw blanket measuring 60x80 inches. Perfect for cozying up on the couch or adding warmth to your bedroom. Machine washable and available in multiple colors.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser
description: Ultrasonic essential oil diffuser with LED mood lighting. Features 7 color options, auto shut-off, and whisper-quiet operation. Creates a relaxing atmosphere while humidifying your space.

name: The Art of Programming
description: Comprehensive guide to modern software development practices. Covers design patterns, clean code principles, and best practices. Perfect for intermediate to advanced developers looking to level up their skills.

name: Mindfulness and Meditation
description: A practical guide to incorporating mindfulness into your daily life. Learn proven techniques to reduce stress, improve focus, and find inner peace. Includes guided exercises and meditation practices.

name: The Complete Cookbook
description: Over 500 delicious recipes from around the world. From quick weeknight dinners to impressive entertaining dishes. Includes step-by-step instructions, beautiful photography, and helpful cooking tips.
